About Lookback Periods

Some states require specific CE hours to be completed within a recent time window. For example, Florida's Autonomous APRN registration requires 45 hours of pharmacology completed within the past 5 years.

Hours completed outside the lookback window still appear in "Total Hrs" but don't count toward "Valid Hrs" for compliance.

How CEU Tracker Works

Understanding the compliance tracking system

🚦 Compliance Status Definitions

Complete

Provider has completed all required CE hours for the renewal period. No action needed.

In Progress

Provider has remaining CE hours to complete but has more than 60 days until their renewal deadline. Monitor progress.

At Risk

Provider has remaining CE hours AND their renewal deadline is within 60 days. Immediate attention required.

Credentials Needed

Provider's CE Broker login credentials are not in the system. Cannot track compliance until credentials are submitted.

📊 Data Sources

CE Broker (Primary)

The official compliance tracking system used by most state nursing boards. CE Broker provides:

  • License renewal deadlines
  • Required CE hours by subject area
  • Completed CE hours and transcript
  • Overall compliance status

Note: Providers without CE Broker credentials show as "Credentials Needed" and cannot be fully tracked.

Platform Scrapers (Secondary)

Additional CE platforms are scraped to capture courses that may not yet appear in CE Broker:

  • NetCE — Course completion history
  • CEUfast — Course completion history
  • AANP Certification — National certification CE credits

Platform data supplements CE Broker data and helps identify courses in progress.

👥 Provider Types & Requirements

Clinical Provider

NP, MD, DO

Nurse Practitioners, Medical Doctors, and Doctors of Osteopathy have prescriptive authority and must meet APRN/Physician CE requirements including:

  • Pharmacology hours
  • Controlled substance prescribing
  • State-specific mandated topics
  • Florida Autonomous APRN requirements (HB 607) where applicable
Support Staff

RN

Registered Nurses have different CE requirements focused on nursing practice:

  • Prevention of medical errors
  • Domestic violence awareness
  • Human trafficking recognition
  • State-specific mandated topics

📧 Email Reminders

Daily Renewal Reminders

Sent daily at 8:00 AM EST to:

  • brittany.toliver@fountain.net
  • faith@fountain.net

Reminders are sent when providers have:

  • Renewal deadline within 30 days
  • Status is NOT Complete (still have CE hours remaining)

Reminders continue daily until the provider completes their requirements or the deadline passes.

Weekly Digest

Sent every Monday at 9:00 AM EST with a full compliance summary and PDF attachment.

🔐 Credential Status Indicators

Indicator Meaning Action Needed
✓ Healthy Login working, data retrieved successfully None
◷ Degraded Occasional login failures (1-2 consecutive) Monitor - may be temporary
⚠ Warning Multiple consecutive failures (3-4) Verify credentials are correct
✗ Critical 5+ consecutive failures Password likely changed - update credentials
○ Not Configured No credentials in system Obtain and add CE Broker login

🧮 How Status is Calculated

1
Get Hours Data

Pull required and completed hours from CE Broker for each license

2
Calculate Remaining

Remaining Hours = Required Hours - Completed Hours

3
Check Deadline

Calculate days until renewal deadline

4
Determine Status
  • Remaining = 0 → Complete
  • Remaining > 0 AND Days > 60 → In Progress
  • Remaining > 0 AND Days ≤ 60 → At Risk

🔄 Data Refresh Schedule

10:30 PM EST Daily scrape of all providers (CE Broker + platforms)
8:00 AM EST Daily renewal reminder emails (if applicable)
9:00 AM EST (Mondays) Weekly compliance digest email
After each scrape Dashboard auto-published to Vercel

❓ Frequently Asked Questions

Why does a provider show "Credentials Needed"?

The provider's CE Broker username and password are not in the system. Contact the provider to obtain their credentials and submit them to be added.

Why is platform data different from CE Broker data?

CE platforms (NetCE, CEUfast) track course completions, but there can be a delay before those credits appear in CE Broker. Platform data shows the most recent activity.

How often is data updated?

Data is scraped daily at 10:30 PM EST and the dashboard is automatically updated. The "Last scraped" timestamp in the footer shows when data was last refreshed.

What do the different login error types mean?

🔐 Invalid Credentials: Username or password is incorrect. The provider may have changed their CE Broker password. Contact them for updated credentials.

🔒 Account Locked: The CE Broker account has been locked due to too many failed attempts or was disabled. Provider needs to contact CE Broker support.

📱 2FA Required: The provider has enabled two-factor authentication on their CE Broker account. They need to disable 2FA or provide an alternative access method.

⏱️ Connection Timeout: CE Broker was slow or down during the scrape. This usually resolves on the next automated run.

🔧 Site Changed: CE Broker updated their website structure. Contact support - the scraper may need to be updated.

📡 Network Error: Connection issue during scrape. Check internet and will retry on next run.

🔄 Session Error: Login session couldn't be established. Will retry on next run.

Why are some subject areas highlighted in red?

Red highlighting indicates the provider hasn't completed the required hours for that specific subject area (e.g., Pharmacology, Human Trafficking). These are mandatory topics that must be completed.

Overview

CEU Compliance Dashboard — Generated Monday, April 27, 2026 at 10:57 PM

📋 What This Service Does

The CEU Tracker is an automated compliance monitoring system that tracks Continuing Education (CE) requirements for Fountain's clinical team. It scrapes data nightly from CE Broker (the official state compliance system) and supplementary CE platforms to provide real-time visibility into each provider's license renewal status.

Key Features:

  • Automated Scraping: Data collected daily at 10:30 PM EST from CE Broker + platforms
  • Multi-Platform Tracking: NetCE, CEUfast, AANP Cert, and more
  • Email Alerts: Daily reminders for providers with deadlines within 30 days
  • Weekly Digest: Full compliance report emailed every Monday at 9:00 AM EST

💡 How to Use This Dashboard

  1. Team View: See all providers with their current compliance status
  2. Compliance: View providers grouped by status (At Risk, In Progress, Complete)
  3. Platforms: See CE course data from external platforms (NetCE, CEUfast, etc.)
  4. Reports: Export data, view history, and access run logs

Tip: Click on any provider card to see detailed license information, subject area breakdowns, and completed courses.
